mapper.select: SELECT faq_no AS faqNo, cs_cate_no AS csCateNo, writer_no AS writerNo, title, content, hit, reg_date AS regDate, update_date AS updateDate FROM faq ORDER BY faq_no DESC
SELECT faq_no AS faqNo, cs_cate_no AS csCateNo, writer_no AS writerNo, title, content, hit, reg_date AS regDate, update_date AS updateDate FROM faq WHERE faq_no=#{faqNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO faq(cs_cate_no, writer_no, title, content, hit, reg_date) VALUES(#{csCateNo}, COALESCE(#{writerNo}, 1), #{title}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE faq SET cs_cate_no=#{csCateNo}, writer_no=#{writerNo}, title=#{title}, content=#{content}, hit=#{hit}, update_date=NOW() WHERE faq_no=#{faqNo}
